title: Automated Land Tax Management System
description: A MERN Stack solution built for the Land Commissioner’s Department, Western Province, Sri Lanka. Features include automated tax notifications, admin dashboards, real-time data handling, and predictive analytics.

title: Traintimely
description: An intuitive train scheduling system built with PHP and MySQL. Enables users to view real-time train schedules and book tickets seamlessly. Features responsive design and efficient database management.

title: PaletteVista
description: A modern digital art gallery web application that showcases my painting collection in an interactive online environment. Built with React, Tailwind CSS, and Framer Motion, it offers a smooth, responsive experience and plans for future e-commerce enhancements.

title: Tuition Class Management App
description: A Flutter-based mobile application for managing tuition classes with Admin and Teacher roles. Features include student registration, attendance tracking, payment management, guardian notifications, and resource sharing for students.

title: Online Bookshop
description: A full-stack web application with a sleek glassmorphism UI for browsing, filtering, and purchasing books. Includes user authentication, cart management, and Google API integration for enhanced search functionality.

title: Pet Care Website
description: A web application built with HTML, CSS, JavaScript, PHP, and MySQL to improve accessibility and efficiency in pet care services. Focused on intuitive navigation, interactive features, and optimized performance.

title: Protocol 404 Logo Design
description: Three bold and modern logo concepts for Protocol 404, focusing on uniqueness and a youthful appeal. Dark azure backgrounds give a confident look, while gold logos add a royal and premium touch.

title: ECL Energy Logo Design
description: A professional logo design created for ECL Energy, representing renewable energy, hydropower, and solar concepts with a modern touch using green, yellow, and sky blue color themes.

title: Faculty of Computing Website
description: Implemented the Faculty of Computing website as part of the campus development team using WordPress and Elementor Pro.

title: Personal Logo Design for Future Business Product
description: A personal logo design created for my own business product, representing my brand identity with modern and visually appealing elements.

title: Logo Design for Future Travel Website 'Momento'
description: A personal logo created for my traveling memories website, Momento, representing adventure, exploration, and memorable experiences.

title: Educational YouTube Video Editing
description: Creating and editing educational YouTube lecture videos and social media content for accounting subjects using Canva with engaging transitions and text animations.

title: 3D Classroom Visualization
description: My first experience with 3D modeling and visualization using Blender. Designed a realistic classroom environment with desks, chairs, and lighting.

title: UI/UX Design – Tuition Class Management App
description: A complete UI/UX design created in Figma for the Tuition Class Management mobile app. Focused on smooth navigation, role-based accessibility, and an engaging modern layout for Admin and Teacher dashboards. Designed with a clean, user-friendly interface to enhance usability and system efficiency.
